    About Me

    Overview

    Hi, I’m Michael, but folks call me Mickey! I’ve been working as a freelance programmer for over 5 years. I specialize in WordPress development, tinkering behind the scenes on custom plugins and bug fixes. I’m well versed in most of the widely used web technologies and languages, as well as other popular CMS such as Joomla and OpenCart. For a full list of my skill set, see below.

    I’ve also been branching out in to game development, and have worked on a few small video game productions, as both a programmer and artist. I have experience working with all the industry standard game engines such as Unity, Unreal Engine, GameMaker Studio and CryEngine.

    Skills

    • Full Stack Web Developer
      • HTML, CSS, PHP, MySQL, Apache, CentOS
    • CSS Preprocessors
      • Sass, Less
    • Content Management Systems
      • WordPress, OpenCart, Joomla, Drupal, Magento, GetSimple
    • Static Site Generators
      • Jekyll, Hugo
    • Game Development
      • Unity, GameMaker Studio, Unreal Engine, CryEngine
    • Graphic Design
      • Adobe Illustrator, Adobe Photoshop, Blender, Paint.Net
    • Video Editing
      • Adobe Premiere, Sony Vegas Pro

    Contact

    Do you want to work on something together? Want to hire me for something? Want to just say howdy? Please do! You can reach out to me via this contact form, or through my various social network handles below.
